title: Product development at the system level

clauses.title: Scope of system-level development
clauses.text: This part specifies requirements for developing safety-related systems, including technical safety concepts, system design, integration, and verification.

clauses.title: Technical safety concept
clauses.text: A technical safety concept shall be developed that specifies the technical safety requirements and their allocation to hardware and software elements.
notes: Derives from the functional safety concept.

clauses.title: System design specification
clauses.text: The system design shall specify the architecture, interfaces between elements, and the safety mechanisms that ensure compliance with the technical safety requirements.
notes: Safety mechanisms include monitoring, redundancy, and diagnostics.

clauses.title: System integration and testing
clauses.text: System integration shall verify that the integrated system meets the technical safety requirements. Test cases shall be derived from the technical safety concept.
notes: Both positive and negative test cases are required.

clauses.title: Safety validation
clauses.text: Safety validation shall confirm that the safety goals are achieved at the vehicle level under the intended operating conditions.
